rules.name: SendEmail
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) AND ((3 AND 4 AND 5) OR ( 6 AND 7 AND 8))
rules.label: Send Email

decisions.name: ShouldDeleteExistingEPCFile

decisions.name: Which_Email_Template_to_Send_LAs
decisions.label: Which Email Template to Send LAs

Flow.description: A flow that guides agents through information submission for landlords as businesses or individuals, capturing names, emails, telephone numbers, and addresses.

formulas.name: fla_EmailRegistrationJson
formulas.expression: "{\"full_name\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_UserAccount.Landlord_Type__c}, "Agent"), {!rcd_UserAccount.FirstName} & " " & {!rcd_UserAccount.LastName}, IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c}), {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordFirstName__c} & " " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordLastName__c}, {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c} ) ), "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"reference_number\": \"" & {!rcd_Exemption.Ref_Number__c} & "\", \"child_references\": \"" & {!var_RegisteredChildExemptions} & "\", \"url\": \"" & {!fla_ExemptionsRegisterDashboardURL} & "\"}"

formulas.name: fla_ExemptionTypeAdditionalInformation
formulas.expression:
SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!GetCreatedExemptionType.Exemption_Type__r.AdditionalInformation__c}, ":", ":
" ), "-", "
-" ), "approved methodology and software program", "approved methodology and software program (opens in new tab)" ), "Find your local authority", "Find your local authority (opens in a new tab)." )

formulas.name: fla_FilteredCountry
formulas.expression: CASE({!var_FilteredLandlordDeliveryPointAddress.COUNTRY_CODE}, "E", "England", "W", "Wales", "S", "Scotland", "N", "Northern Ireland", "L", "Channel Islands", "M", "Isle of Man", "J", "United Kingdom", "United Kingdom")

formulas.name: fla_LandlordAddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF({!var_NumberOfLandlordAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!var_EnteredLandlordPostcode}, TEXT({!var_NumberOfLandlordAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!var_EnteredLandlordPostcode})

formulas.name: fla_LocalAuthorityMultipleExemptionEmailJSON
formulas.expression: "{\"local_authority\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!GetLocalAuthorityAccount.Name}, "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"name\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_UserAccount.Landlord_Type__c}, "Agent"), {!rcd_UserAccount.FirstName} & " " & {!rcd_UserAccount.LastName}, IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c}), {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordFirstName__c} & " " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordLastName__c}, {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c} ) ), "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"domesticOrNonDomestic\": \"" & IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyType__c}, "Residential"), "Residential", "Non-domestic" ) & "\", \"address\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyAddress__c} & ", " & {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCity__c} & ", " & IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCounty__c}), "", {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCounty__c} & ", " ) & {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyPostcode__c} & ", ", "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"date\": \"" & TEXT(TODAY()) & "\", \"exemption_info\": \"" & {!var_LocalAuthorityMultipleExemptionRegisteredEmailInfo} & "\", \"url\": \"" & {!fla_LocalAuthorityExemptionURL} & "\"}"

formulas.name: fla_LocalAuthoritySingleExemptionEmailJSON
formulas.expression: "{\"local_authority\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!GetLocalAuthorityAccount.Name}, "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"name\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_UserAccount.Landlord_Type__c}, "Agent"), {!rcd_UserAccount.FirstName} & " " & {!rcd_UserAccount.LastName}, IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c}), {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordFirstName__c} & " " & {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordLastName__c}, {!rcd_Exemption.LandlordBusinessName__c} ) ), "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"domesticOrNonDomestic\": \"" & IF( ISPICKVAL({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyType__c}, "Residential"), "Residential", "Non-domestic" ) & "\", \"address\": \"" & SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyAddress__c} & ", " & {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCity__c} & ", " & IF( ISBLANK({!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCounty__c}), "", {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyCounty__c} & ", " ) & {!rcd_Exemption.PropertyPostcode__c} & ", ", "\\", "\\\\" ), "\"", "\\\"" ), BR(), "\\n" ) & "\", \"exemption_info\": \"" & {!var_LocalAuthoritySingleExemptionRegisteredEmailInfo} & "\", \"date\": \"" & TEXT(TODAY()) & "\", \"url\": \"" & {!fla_LocalAuthorityExemptionURL} & "\"}"

formulas.name: fla_PropertyAddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF({!var_NumberOfPropertyAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!var_EnteredPropertyPostcode}, TEXT({!var_NumberOfPropertyAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!var_EnteredPropertyPostcode})

formulas.name: fla_SummaryExemptionTypeAdditionalInformation
formulas.expression:
SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( {!GetChildExemptionById.Exemption_Type__r.AdditionalInformation__c}, ":", ":
" ), "-", "
-" ), "approved methodology and software program", "approved methodology and software program (opens in new tab)" ), "Find your local authority", "Find your local authority (opens in a new tab)." )

formulas.name: fla_SummaryIndividualExemptionName
formulas.expression: "Uploaded evidence for" + BR() + {!LoopThroughChildExemptions.Name} + BR() +" Exemption code: " + {!LoopThroughChildExemptions.Exemption_Type_Code__c}

formulas.name: fla_SummaryUserAddressesAvailableText
formulas.expression: IF({!var_NumberOfLandlordAsUserAddressesReturned} == 1, "1 address found for " & {!var_SummaryEnteredPostcode}, TEXT({!var_NumberOfLandlordAsUserAddressesReturned}) & " addresses found for " & {!var_SummaryEnteredPostcode})

Flow.label: PRSE Exemption Registration

value.stringValue: Any other information must be 1200 characters or less
If there is anything else you think we should know, you can tell us here.
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard
Enter an agent organisation or business name
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
You may be contacted on this number.
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard

Agent address

If your address is outside the UK, please enter it manually.
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Find address,Enter address manually,Save and return to dashboard

Organisation or business address

If the organisation or business address is outside the UK, please enter it manually
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Find address,Enter address manually,Save and return to dashboard
Enter an organisation or business name
This is the first name of the person who manages exemptions for the business
This is the last name of the person who manages exemptions for the business
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
This should be the email address of the person who manages exemptions for the business.
The organisation may be contacted on this number
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard
Is the landlord an organisation or business, or an individual?
Select organisation if the property is let under a business name, or is owned by an organisation.
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard
Is this account for a business or an individual?
This means that the properties are let under a business name, or by a housing organisation, rather than by an individual.
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard

Your energy performance certificate (EPC)

This information is generated from the energy performance certificate register.



Address {!fla_PropertyAddressForEPC}
Energy rating {!Get_EPC_Info.energyRating}
Date of certificate {!Get_EPC_Info.dateOfCertificate}
Is this the correct energy performance certificate for the property?
Yes|No, upload an energy performance certificate
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard

We found an expired energy performance certificate (EPC) for this property.

You can renew your EPC at Get a new energy certificate (opens in a new tab) or upload a copy of a new EPC for this property.

Upload an energy performance certificate (EPC)

You must provide the energy performance certificate (EPC) for the address that you are registering.

The file must be in png, pdf, jpg, jpeg, doc or docx format.
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard

{!GetCreatedExemptionType.Name}: upload evidence

If you have selected more than one exemption, you will upload evidence for each exemption in turn.

You are registering your property for the exemption:
{!GetCreatedExemptionType.Name}: {!GetCreatedExemptionType.Exemption_Type_Code__c}

You must provide:

{!fla_ExemptionTypeRequiredEvidence}

{!fla_ExemptionTypeAdditionalInformation}

You can upload up to 20 files.

Make sure that your files have clear names that describe them before you upload them.

Files must be:

  • in png, pdf, jpg, jpeg, doc or docx format
  • up to 20MB per file in size
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard

Your exemption reference number is:
{!fla_RegisteredChildExemptions}


The exemption will now show on the registered exemptions page of your dashboard.

Please make a note of the reference number for your records.

You should receive a confirmation email within 72 hours with the information shown on this page.

What happens next

Your exemption is now valid. You can let your property.

Your exemption will now appear on the exemptions register.

If all your evidence was correctly uploaded, the exemption is valid for:

• 6 months from the date you became a landlord, if you are a new landlord
• the duration of the current tenancy, when you’ve applied for a third-party exemption because your tenant refuses consent
• 5 years for all other exemptions

We will send you an email notification 28 days before the expiry of your registered exemption.

If you sell the property, you will need to end the exemption.
Exemptions do not transfer to a new owner.

Review of your exemption

Your exemption has been sent to the local authority for review. They may review it at any time.

If you did not upload the correct evidence, or are not eligible, the local authority may ask for more information about your exemption.

They will contact you to explain what you need to do.

You exemption reference numbers are:
{!fla_RegisteredChildExemptions}


The exemptions will now show on the registered exemptions page of your dashboard.

Please make a note of the reference numbers for your records.

You should receive a confirmation email within 72 hours with the information shown on this page.

What happens next

Your exemptions are now valid. You can let your property.

Your exemptions will now appear on the exemptions register.

If all your evidence was correctly uploaded, the exemptions are valid for:

• 6 months from the date you became a landlord, if you are a new landlord
• the duration of the current tenancy, when you’ve applied for a third-party exemption because your tenant refuses consent
• 5 years for all other exemptions

We will send you an email notification 28 days before the expiry of your registered exemptions.

If you sell the property, you will need to end the exemption.
Exemptions do not transfer to a new owner.

Review of your exemption

Your exemptions have been sent to the local authority for review. They may review them at any time.

If you did not upload the correct evidence, or are not eligible, the local authority may ask for more information about your exemption(s).

The local authority will contact you to explain what you need to do. They will tell you the reference number of the exemption they are contacting you about.
Check your answers and submit your exemption registration
Details of the property being registered for an exemption
You can be fined up to £5000 for providing false or misleading information.
I confirm that all the information I have submitted is accurate
Select the box to confirm that the information you have submitted is accurate
Register your exemption,Save and return to dashboard
You will be able to review and edit your previous answers before registering your exemption.

Select exemptions to register for this property

You can select more than one exemption.

If you select more than one exemption, you will upload evidence for each exemption separately.

Read our guidance on exemptions (opens in new tab) for:

  • more information about each exemption type
  • what evidence is required for each exemption
Which exemptions are you registering for this property?
Have you selected all the exemptions that you want to register for this property?
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard

Landlord address

If the landlord's address is outside the UK, please enter it manually
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Find address,Enter address manually,Save and return to dashboard

Landlord's details

These must be the details of the landlord who owns the property. Otherwise the exemption will not be valid.
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
We will use this email address to communicate with the landlord if the local authority needs further information, or suspects non-compliance.
The landlord may be contacted on this number.
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard
Use this address,Use a different address,Enter address manually,Save and return to dashboard
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Use this address, Save and return to dashboard
Use this address,Enter address manually,Search again,Save and return to dashboard
Enter address manually,Search again,Save and return to dashboard

Business address

If your address is outside the UK, please enter it manually.
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Find address,Enter address manually,Save and return to dashboard
This is the first name of the person who manages exemptions for the business
This is the last name of the person who manages exemptions for the business
Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
This should be the email address of the person who manages exemptions for the business.
You may be contacted on this number.
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard

If the address is outside the UK, please enter it manually.
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT

Enter an email address in the correct format, like name@example.com
You may be contacted on this number.

What type of property are you registering an exemption for?
Your energy performance certificate may tell you the property type.
This means any privately rented property that is a residential dwelling not used for commercial purposes.|This includes commercial and public sector buildings.
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard

{!GetChildExemptionById.Name}: upload evidence

If you have selected more than one exemption, you will upload evidence for each exemption in turn.

You are registering your property for the exemption:
{!GetChildExemptionById.Name}: {!GetChildExemptionById.Exemption_Type_Code__c}

You must provide:

{!fla_SummaryExemptionTypeRequiredEvidence}

{!fla_SummaryExemptionTypeAdditionalInformation}

You can upload up to 20 files.

Make sure that your files have clear names that describe them before you upload them.

Files must be:

  • in png, pdf, jpg, jpeg, doc or docx format
  • up to 20MB per file in size
Save and continue,Save and return to dashboard
Use this address,Use a different address,Enter address manually,Save and return to dashboard
Enter a postcode in the correct format, like PO12 6NT
Use this address, Save and return to dashboard
